    FROM results AS res 
    JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId 
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
), 
DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (
    SELECT driverId, points, CareerRaceNumber
    FROM RaceResults 
    WHERE CareerRaceNumber <= 5
)
SELECT d.driverId, 
       d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS DriverName,
       MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 1 THEN points END) AS Race1_Points,
       MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN points END) AS Race2_Points,
       MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 3 THEN points END) AS Race3_Points,
       MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 4 THEN points END) AS Race4_Points,
       MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 5 THEN points END) AS Race5_Points
FROM DriverFirstFiveRaces AS r

WITH cte AS (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        "Examination Date", 
        thrombosis, 
        LAG(thrombosis, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY "Examination Date") AS risklag,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY id, strftime('%Y-%m', "Examination Date") 
            ORDER BY "Examination Date" DESC
        ) AS rn 
    FROM Examination
    WHERE thrombosis IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    id, 
    strftime('%Y-%m', "Examination Date") AS examination_month,
    CASE 
        WHEN risklag IS NOT NULL AND risklag < thrombosis THEN 'Yes' 
        WHEN risklag IS NOT NULL AND risklag >= thrombosis THEN 'No'
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS increase_risk,
    CASE 
        WHEN risklag IS NOT NULL AND risklag > thrombosis THEN 'Yes' 
        WHEN risklag IS NOT NULL AND risklag <= thrombosis THEN 'No'
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS decrease_risk
FROM cte 
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY id, "Examination Date"

WITH RECURSIVE split_string AS (
    SELECT 
        your_column_name AS original_string,
        your_column_name AS remaining_string,
        1 AS position,
        '' AS current_value
    FROM your_table_name
    WHERE your_column_name IS NOT NULL
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        original_string,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remaining_string, ',') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(remaining_string, INSTR(remaining_string, ',') + 1)
            ELSE ''
        END AS remaining_string,
        position + 1,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remaining_string, ',') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(remaining_string, 1, INSTR(remaining_string, ',') - 1)
            ELSE remaining_string
        END AS current_value
    FROM split_string
    WHERE remaining_string != ''
)
SELECT 
    original_string,
    CAST(current_value AS REAL) AS decimal_value,
    position
FROM split_string
WHERE current_value != ''
ORDER BY original_string, position

WITH RECURSIVE
-- Merge overlapping blackout periods
merged_blackouts(start_date, end_date) AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date
    FROM blackout_periods
    WHERE NOT EXISTS(
        SELECT 1 FROM blackout_periods bp2 
        WHERE blackout_periods.start_date > bp2.start_date 
        AND blackout_periods.start_date <= bp2.end_date
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT m.start_date,
           CASE 
               WHEN m.end_date >= b.end_date THEN m.end_date
               ELSE b.end_date
           END
    FROM merged_blackouts m
    JOIN blackout_periods b ON b.start_date <= m.end_date AND b.end_date > m.end_date
),
-- Get unique merged blackout periods
unique_blackouts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT start_date, end_date
    FROM merged_blackouts
),
-- Create all possible time points
time_points AS (
    SELECT start_date AS point FROM account_activity
    UNION
    SELECT end_date FROM account_activity
    UNION
    SELECT start_date FROM blackout_periods
    UNION
    SELECT end_date FROM blackout_periods
),
-- Generate intervals between consecutive time points
intervals AS (
    SELECT point AS start_interval,
           LEAD(point) OVER (ORDER BY point) AS end_interval
    FROM time_points
),
-- Find clean operational periods
clean_periods AS (
    SELECT i.start_interval, i.end_interval
    FROM intervals i
    WHERE i.end_interval IS NOT NULL
    -- Must be within some active period
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM account_activity a
        WHERE i.start_interval >= a.start_date 
        AND i.end_interval <= a.end_date
        AND i.start_interval < i.end_interval
    )
    -- Must not overlap with any blackout period
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM unique_blackouts b
        WHERE i.start_interval < b.end_date 
        AND i.end_interval > b.start_date
    )
)
SELECT start_interval AS start_date, end_interval AS end_date
FROM clean_periods
WHERE start_interval < end_interval
ORDER BY start_interval

WITH OrderedContracts AS (
    SELECT 
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        LAG(EndDate) OVER (PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType ORDER BY StartDate) AS PrevEndDate,
        LAG(DriverId) OVER (ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate) AS PrevDriverId,
        LAG(ContractType) OVER (ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate) AS PrevContractType
    FROM driverContracts
    ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate
),
GroupedContracts AS (
    SELECT 
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN PrevDriverId IS NULL OR PrevDriverId != DriverId OR PrevContractType != ContractType OR julianday(StartDate) > julianday(PrevEndDate) + 1
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) OVER (ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS GroupNum
    FROM OrderedContracts
)
SELECT 
    DriverId,
    ContractType,
    MIN(StartDate) AS StartDate,
    MAX(EndDate) AS EndDate
FROM GroupedContracts
GROUP BY DriverId, ContractType, GroupNum
ORDER BY DriverId, MIN(StartDate)

WITH RECURSIVE CTE_RN AS (
    SELECT e.exp_id, e.mid, e.qty, i.qty AS LimitQty, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY e.exp_id) AS rn 
    FROM Experiment AS e 
    INNER JOIN Inventory AS i ON e.mid = i.mid 
    WHERE e.mid = 2
), 
CTE_Recursive AS (
    -- Base case: first experiment
    SELECT r.exp_id, r.mid, r.qty, r.LimitQty, r.rn,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS ConsumedQty,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Executable,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS RunningTotalConsumed
    FROM CTE_RN AS r 
    WHERE r.rn = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: subsequent experiments
    SELECT r.exp_id, r.mid, r.qty, r.LimitQty, r.rn,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= (r.LimitQty - rec.RunningTotalConsumed) THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS ConsumedQty,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= (r.LimitQty - rec.RunningTotalConsumed) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Executable,
           rec.RunningTotalConsumed + 
               CASE WHEN r.qty <= (r.LimitQty - rec.RunningTotalConsumed) THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS RunningTotalConsumed
    FROM CTE_RN AS r 
    INNER JOIN CTE_Recursive AS rec ON rec.rn + 1 = r.rn
)
SELECT exp_id, mid, Executable 
FROM CTE_Recursive 
ORDER BY rn

WITH filled_data AS (
  SELECT 
    trans_id,
    account_id,
    date,
    COALESCE(operation, 
      (SELECT t2.operation FROM trans t2 
       WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id 
       AND t2.date <= trans.date 
       AND t2.operation IS NOT NULL 
       ORDER BY t2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS operation_filled,
    COALESCE(type, 
      (SELECT t2.type FROM trans t2 
       WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id 
       AND t2.date <= trans.date 
       AND t2.type IS NOT NULL 
       ORDER BY t2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS type_filled,
    COALESCE(operation, 
      (SELECT t2.operation FROM trans t2 
       WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id 
       AND t2.date <= trans.date 
       AND t2.operation IS NOT NULL 
       ORDER BY t2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS operation_filled,
    COALESCE(k_symbol, 
      (SELECT t2.k_symbol FROM trans t2 
       WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id 
       AND t2.date <= trans.date 
       AND t2.k_symbol IS NOT NULL 
       ORDER BY t2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS k_symbol_filled,
    COALESCE(bank, 
      (SELECT t2.bank FROM trans t2 
       WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id 
       AND t2.date <= trans.date 
       AND t2.bank IS NOT NULL 
       ORDER BY t2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS bank_filled,
    COALESCE(account, 
      (SELECT t2.account FROM trans t2 
       WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id 
       AND t2.date <= trans.date 
       AND t2.account IS NOT NULL 
       ORDER BY t2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS account_filled,
    amount,
    balance
  FROM trans
)
UPDATE trans 
SET 
  operation = (SELECT operation_filled FROM filled_data WHERE filled_data.trans_id = trans.trans_id),
  k_symbol = (SELECT k_symbol_filled FROM filled_data WHERE filled_data.trans_id = trans.trans_id),
  bank = (SELECT bank_filled FROM filled_data WHERE filled_data.trans_id = trans.trans_id),
  account = (SELECT account_filled FROM filled_data WHERE filled_data.trans_id = trans.trans_id)
WHERE trans_id IN (
  SELECT trans_id FROM filled_data 
  WHERE operation_filled IS NOT NULL 
     OR k_symbol_filled IS NOT NULL 
     OR bank_filled IS NOT NULL 
     OR account_filled IS NOT NULL
)

WITH match_data AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        date,
        home_team_goal,
        away_team_goal,
        CASE WHEN home_team_goal = away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS invoiced
    FROM matches_with_goals  -- Hypothetical table with proper columns
),
accumulated_goals AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        date,
        invoiced,
        home_team_goal + away_team_goal AS match_goals,
        SUM(home_team_goal + away_team_goal) OVER (ORDER BY date, id) AS running_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN invoiced = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY date, id) AS invoice_group
    FROM match_data
),
grouped_data AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        date,
        invoiced,
        match_goals,
        running_total,
        FIRST_VALUE(running_total) OVER (PARTITION BY invoice_group ORDER BY date, id) AS group_start_total,
        LAST_VALUE(running_total) OVER (PARTITION BY invoice_group ORDER BY date, id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS group_end_total
    FROM accumulated_goals
)
SELECT 
    id,
    date,
    invoiced,
    CASE WHEN invoiced = 1 THEN 
        (SELECT SUM(match_goals) FROM accumulated_goals a2 WHERE a2.date <= grouped_data.date AND a2.date > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(date) FROM accumulated_goals a3 WHERE a3.invoiced = 1 AND a3.date < grouped_data.date), '1900-01-01'))
    ELSE 0 END AS amount
FROM grouped_data
WHERE invoiced = 1
ORDER BY date, id

WITH LastTransactionsPerStation AS (
    -- Get the last transaction for each customer-gasstation combination
    SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID, location_id ORDER BY StartDate DESC, transaction_time DESC) AS rn_last_per_station
    FROM transactions_1k
),
FilteredTransactions AS (
    -- Filter to only keep the last transaction per gas station
    SELECT *
    FROM LastTransactionsPerStation
    WHERE rn_last_per_station = 1
),
CustomerIssueAnalysis AS (
    -- Determine if customer has any transactions with amount < 10
    SELECT CustomerID,
           MIN(CASE WHEN amount_value < 10 THEN location_id END) AS first_issue_gasstation_id
    FROM FilteredTransactions
    GROUP BY CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    ft.CustomerID,
    ft.TransactionID,
    ft.location_id AS gasstationid,
    ft.amount_value AS amount
FROM FilteredTransactions ft
JOIN CustomerIssueAnalysis cia ON ft.CustomerID = cia.CustomerID
WHERE 
    -- If customer has issues (amount < 10), show the first gas station with issue
    (cia.first_issue_gasstation_id IS NOT NULL AND ft.location_id = cia.first_issue_gasstation_id)
    OR
    -- If customer has no issues, show all last transactions at each gas station
    (cia.first_issue_gasstation_id IS NULL)
ORDER BY ft.CustomerID, ft.location_id

WITH user_action_sequences AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        action,
        action_time,
        LEAD(action_time) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY action_time) AS next_action_time
    FROM user_actions
    WHERE action IN ('LOGIN', 'SEARCH', 'BUY')
),
search_with_context AS (
    SELECT 
        s.user_id,
        s.action_time as search_time,
        s.next_action_time,
        -- Check if there's a BUY action between this SEARCH and the next LOGIN/non-SEARCH action
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM user_actions b 
            WHERE b.user_id = s.user_id 
                AND b.action = 'BUY'
                AND b.action_time > s.action_time 
                AND (s.next_action_time IS NULL OR b.action_time < s.next_action_time)
        ) AS has_buy_before_next_login
    FROM user_action_sequences s
    WHERE s.action = 'SEARCH'
)
SELECT 
    user_id, 
    COUNT(*) as abandoned_search_count
FROM search_with_context
WHERE has_buy_before_next_login = 0
GROUP BY user_id

user_connections AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT u1.username as user1, u2.username as user2
    FROM users u1
    JOIN users u2 ON (u1.ref1 = u2.ref1 OR u1.ref1 = u2.ref2 OR u1.ref2 = u2.ref1 OR u1.ref2 = u2.ref2)
    WHERE u1.username <= u2.username
),
-- Find connected components using recursive CTE
connected_components(user1, user2, component_id) AS (
    -- Base case: each user is connected to itself
    SELECT DISTINCT username, username, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY username)
    FROM users
    
    UNION
    
    -- Recursive case: if user1 connects to user2, they're in the same component
    SELECT cc.user1, uc.user2, cc.component_id
    FROM connected_components cc
    JOIN user_connections uc ON cc.user2 = uc.user1
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM connected_components cc2 
        WHERE cc2.user1 = cc.user1 AND cc2.user2 = uc.user2
    )
),
-- Get final component assignments
final_components AS (
    SELECT user1 as username, MIN(component_id) as component_id
    FROM connected_components
    GROUP BY user1
),
-- Aggregate users by component
merged_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        component_id,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT username) as usernames
    FROM final_components
    GROUP BY component_id
),
-- Count assets for each group
asset_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        mg.component_id,
        mg.usernames,
        COUNT(a.id) as asset_count,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.id) as asset_ids
    FROM merged_groups mg
    LEFT JOIN final_components fc ON mg.component_id = fc.component_id
    LEFT JOIN assets a ON a.owner = fc.username
    GROUP BY mg.component_id, mg.usernames
)
SELECT component_id, usernames, asset_count, asset_ids
FROM asset_counts
ORDER BY component_id

WITH ranked_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        entity_id,
        column_id,
        value,
        updated_at,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id, column_id ORDER BY updated_at) as rn
    FROM player_stats_changes
    WHERE column_id IN ('height', 'weight')
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        pc1.entity_id,
        pc2.updated_at
    FROM player_stats_changes pc1
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT updated_at 
        FROM player_stats_changes 
        WHERE column_id IN ('height', 'weight')
    ) pc2
),
pivoted_data AS (
    SELECT 
        ac.entity_id,
        ac.updated_at,
        MAX(CASE WHEN psc.column_id = 'height' THEN psc.value END) AS height,
        MAX(CASE WHEN psc.column_id = 'weight' THEN psc.value END) AS weight
    FROM all_combinations ac
    LEFT JOIN player_stats_changes psc ON ac.entity_id = psc.entity_id AND ac.updated_at = psc.updated_at
    WHERE (psc.column_id IN ('height', 'weight') OR psc.column_id IS NULL)
    GROUP BY ac.entity_id, ac.updated_at
)
SELECT 
    entity_id,
    updated_at,
    COALESCE(height, 
        (SELECT psc2.value 
         FROM player_stats_changes psc2 
         WHERE psc2.entity_id = pd.entity_id 
         AND psc2.column_id = 'height' 
         AND psc2.updated_at <= pd.updated_at 
         ORDER BY psc2.updated_at DESC 
         LIMIT 1)
    ) AS height,
    COALESCE(weight, 
        (SELECT psc2.value 
         FROM player_stats_changes psc2 
         WHERE psc2.entity_id = pd.entity_id 
         AND psc2.column_id = 'weight' 
         AND psc2.updated_at <= pd.updated_at 
         ORDER BY psc2.updated_at DESC 
         LIMIT 1)
    ) AS weight
FROM pivoted_data pd
ORDER BY entity_id, updated_at

WITH qr1 AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup1 AS subgroup 
    FROM superhero_group 
    WHERE subgroup1 IS NOT NULL
), 
qr2 AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup2 AS subgroup 
    FROM superhero_group 
    WHERE subgroup2 IS NOT NULL
), 
combined AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup FROM qr1 
    UNION 
    SELECT id, subgroup FROM qr2
),
-- Find all pairs that are directly connected (share a subgroup)
direct_connections AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c1.id AS id1, c2.id AS id2
    FROM combined c1
    JOIN combined c2 ON c1.subgroup = c2.subgroup
    WHERE c1.id <= c2.id
),
-- Build connected components using recursive CTE
connected_components AS (
    -- Anchor: start with each id connected to itself
    SELECT id1 as node, id1 as root, 0 as level
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id1 FROM direct_connections) dc
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive: find connections
    SELECT cc.node, dc.id2 as root, cc.level + 1
    FROM connected_components cc
    JOIN direct_connections dc ON cc.root = dc.id1
    WHERE cc.level < 10  -- Prevent infinite recursion
),
-- Get the minimum root for each node to represent its component
final_groups AS (
    SELECT node as id, MIN(root) as group_id
    FROM connected_components
    GROUP BY node
)
SELECT sg.id, COALESCE(fg.group_id, sg.id) as group_id
FROM superhero_group sg
LEFT JOIN final_groups fg ON sg.id = fg.id
ORDER BY sg.id

WITH RECURSIVE bracket_tokens AS (
  -- Base case: find first token in each row
  SELECT 
    id,
    text,
    CASE 
      WHEN INSTR(text, '{{') > 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(text, INSTR(text, '{{')), '}}') > 0 THEN
        SUBSTR(
          text, 
          INSTR(text, '{{'), 
          INSTR(SUBSTR(text, INSTR(text, '{{')), '}}') + 1
        )
      ELSE NULL
    END AS first_token,
    CASE 
      WHEN INSTR(text, '{{') > 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(text, INSTR(text, '{{')), '}}') > 0 THEN
        SUBSTR(
          text, 
          INSTR(text, '{{') + INSTR(SUBSTR(text, INSTR(text, '{{')), '}}') + 1
        )
      ELSE ''
    END AS remaining_text,
    1 AS token_position
  FROM cards 
  WHERE text LIKE '%{{%}}%'
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: find subsequent tokens
  SELECT 
    id,
    text,
    CASE 
      WHEN INSTR(remaining_text, '{{') > 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{{')), '}}') > 0 THEN
        SUBSTR(
          remaining_text, 
          INSTR(remaining_text, '{{'), 
          INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{{')), '}}') + 1
        )
      ELSE NULL
    END AS first_token,
    CASE 
      WHEN INSTR(remaining_text, '{{') > 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{{')), '}}') > 0 THEN
        SUBSTR(
          remaining_text, 
          INSTR(remaining_text, '{{') + INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{{')), '}}') + 1
        )
      ELSE ''
    END AS remaining_text,
    token_position + 1
  FROM bracket_tokens
  WHERE first_token IS NOT NULL 
    AND INSTR(remaining_text, '{{') > 0 
    AND INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{{')), '}}') > 0
),
token_aggregates AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    text,
    GROUP_CONCAT(first_token, ' ') AS all_tokens,
    COUNT(first_token) AS token_count
  FROM bracket_tokens
  GROUP BY id, text
)
SELECT 
  id,
  text,
  COALESCE(all_tokens, '') AS bracketed_tokens,
  token_count
FROM token_aggregates
ORDER BY id

),
ranked_races AS (
    SELECT 
        gender_id,
        race_id,
        superhero_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY gender_id ORDER BY superhero_count DESC) as rank_desc,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY gender_id ORDER BY superhero_count ASC) as rank_asc
    FROM race_counts
)

ORDER BY gender_id, rank_desc

WITH view_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        start_events.session_id,
        start_events.post_id,
        start_events.ts AS start_time,
        end_events.ts AS end_time,
        end_events.view_perc
    FROM view_logs AS start_events
    JOIN view_logs AS end_events 
        ON start_events.session_id = end_events.session_id 
        AND start_events.post_id = end_events.post_id
        AND start_events.event_name = 'view_start'
        AND end_events.event_name = 'view_end'
        AND start_events.ts < end_events.ts
),
grouped_views AS (
    SELECT 
        session_id,
        post_id,
        MIN(start_time) AS start_time,
        MIN(end_time) AS end_time,
        MAX(view_perc) AS view_perc
    FROM view_pairs
    GROUP BY session_id, post_id
)
SELECT 
    session_id,
    post_id,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    CASE 
        WHEN (end_time - start_time > 3 AND view_perc > 0.8) THEN TRUE 
        ELSE FALSE 
    END AS has_impact
FROM grouped_views

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day') THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS yesterday_revenue,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day') THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - 
         SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-8 day') THEN amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-8 day') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0),
        2
    ) AS pct_change_week_ago,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) 
             AND DATE(timestamp) <= DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day') 
             THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS mtd,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) 
                  AND DATE(timestamp) <= DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day') 
                  THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - 
         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 month')) 
                  AND CAST(strftime('%d', timestamp) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(strftime('%d', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) AS INTEGER)
                  THEN amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 month')) 
                        AND CAST(strftime('%d', timestamp) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(strftime('%d', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) AS INTEGER)
                        THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0),
        2
    ) AS pct_change_month_prior
FROM transactions
